metadata.note: Supplemental historical and freight endpoints used when TDX station data does not expose the required station name or position.

stations.name: 港站
stations.note: Estimated as the along-track midpoint between 調車場入口(K006+020) and 北堤路(一)(K007+043), where the official station-pair boundary flips from 台中港-港站 to 港站-延長線.
